name: Wondrous
note: Schedule + price not on web — visit wondrousnyc.com or @wondrousnyc Instagram directly

name: Summer Sings
description: Drop-in choral singing · Mondays 7:30pm · Judson Memorial Church, 55 Washington Sq S · $20/night or $120 season pass
note: Runs Jul 6 – Aug 25. No audition. Different choral work each week; conductor walks you through it.

name: Bushwick Starr: Movie Mondays
description: Weekly short-film screenings by Brooklyn filmmakers · Mondays through August · Eldert St, Bushwick
note: Free, community-rooted screenings. Part of Summers at the Starr. Aug 3, 10, 17, 24, 31.
